title: Witness a Blob of Death
description: Skipping a first-layer check lets a failed Z homing extrude in mid-air, engulfing the nozzle in molten plastic.

dialogue.text: You start a print and walk away. Without verifying the first layer, the Z axis mis-homes and the printer extrudes in mid-air.

options.text: Kill power and note the damage.

dialogue.text: A molten glob encases the nozzle. Next time, watch the first layer to catch issues early.
